---
title: Metadata Relative SCSS Path (Deeper Subdir)
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["#170229", "metadata-relpath-marker", "#cc5501"]
---

## Deeper Subdirectory

`chapters/_metadata.yml` uses `./styles/chapter-styles.scss`. This doc
in `chapters/deep/` should inherit the theme, with the SCSS path
resolved relative to the `_metadata.yml` directory.
